episodes.title: Mahila Congress Demand Resignation: Protest Erupts Over Epstein Files; Hardeep Puri Under Fire
episodes.description:
The Tripura Pradesh Mahila Congress staged a fierce demonstration in front of the Congress Bhavan today, demanding the immediate resignation of Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri. The protest centers on controversial allegations linking the Minister's name to the recently surfaced "Epstein Files" in the United States.
